tables.name: resource-planner
tables.comment:
Single Table Design for resource planning.
pk: ORG#{clerk_org_id} - Multi-tenant isolation by Clerk organization.
sk: Entity prefix (RES#, PRJ#, ASN#) + entity-specific key.
Entities: Resource (people), Project (clients), Assignment (time allocations).
See ../entities.md and ../access-patterns.md for details.

columns.name: pk
columns.comment:
Partition key. Format: ORG#{clerk_org_id}.
All data for one organization shares the same pk for efficient queries.

columns.name: sk
columns.comment:
Sort key. Format varies by entity type:
- RES#{resource_id} for resources (people)
- PRJ#{project_id} for projects (clients)
- ASN#{start_date}#{assignment_id} for assignments
